heading: View and Download Cloud Deployment Logs
body:
Atlas CLI

To download a zipped file containing the logs for the selected hostname using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas logs download <hostname> <mongodb.gz|mongos.gz|mongosqld.gz|mongodb-audit-log.gz|mongos-audit-log.gz> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas logs download](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-logs-download).

Atlas UI

For information on reading MongoDB logs, refer to the
[Log Messages](manual/reference/log-messages) documentation in the
MongoDB manual.
